text: Source (German): Die Regierung hat gestern ein neues Gesetz zur Regulierung der Internetkonzerne verabschiedet.
mt_output: The government has yesterday a new law for the regulation of the internet corporations passed.

text: Source (French): Les chercheurs ont decouvert que le changement climatique affecte la migration des oiseaux plus rapidement qu'on ne le pensait.
mt_output: The researchers have discovered that the climate change affects the migration of the birds more quickly than one thought it.

text: Source (Spanish): El nuevo sistema educativo busca promover el pensamiento critico entre los estudiantes desde una edad temprana.
mt_output: The new educational system looks to promote the critical thinking among the students from an early age.

text: Source (Japanese): この研究は、人工知能が医療診断の精度を大幅に向上させる可能性があることを示しています。
mt_output: This research, the artificial intelligence the medical diagnosis accuracy greatly improve the possibility there is shows.

text: Source (Portuguese): A empresa anunciou que vai investir dois bilhoes de dolares em energia renovavel nos proximos cinco anos.
mt_output: The company announced that will invest two billions of dollars in renewable energy in the next five years.
